_meta.threshold_rationale: ±0.03 typical 20-fixture LLM variance; 0.05 catches true regressions without false-positive noise. See [[feedback-529-contamination-awareness]] for variance bands.

suites.name: phone_60
suites.note: 55-fixture scaled suite (post-Phase-I + GT reclass v2). v5: 0.9200 (single run, LLM variance). v4 was 0.9307 (1 fewer reclass pass). v5 < v4 because LLM variance hits remaining fixtures; 4 newly moved fixtures (image_1882/6636/7296/7376) all score higher in service_institution_60 (composite 1.00/0.89/1.00/0.90). TRUE Phase I Δ ≈ -0.04 (avg of v4+v5 vs PRE 0.9617); within Phase I framework extension cost.

suites.name: pii20_60

suites.name: direction_arrow_60

suites.name: service_institution_60
suites.note: 67-fixture Phase I suite — 13th intent, OBSERVE family. v3: 0.9701 (was 63-fixture 0.9664 in v2). +4 reclassified fixtures from phone_60 (image_1882/6636/7296/7376) all scored ≥0.89 in service_institution. 11 categories (medical 22 / education 22 / government_admin 12 / financial 5 / government_law 3 / school_childcare 1 / clinic 1 / training 1 / childcare 1 / gov_service 1).
